title: Aurora, 12771, Bonnie Brown Teddy Bear, 9In, Soft Toy, Brown, Medium
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Bonnie Bear is a gorgeous super soft Teddy Bear with a cuddly body
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: From the manufacturer Aurora 7-inch Bonnie Teddy Bear (Brown) Bonnie Brown is looking for a new home! This gorgeous teddy bear is full of character and with those expressive eyes, he will make the perfect gift for anyone who loves cuddly toys. Bring Bonnie Bear home today. Our 7" Bonnie Teddy Bear is a beautiful, traditional bear made especially for cuddles. He sits just right and is produced to the highest standard! The perfect gift for all ages. Suitable from birth
